narrative:
Cols 72-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 790 registered voters, with 44.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
